name: Contentful
description: Enterprise headless CMS and content platform with API-first architecture

description.value: Enterprise headless CMS and content platform with API-first architecture

repository.comment: Proprietary SaaS platform; client SDKs are open source on GitHub

initial-release.comment: Founded in 2013 in Berlin by Sascha Konietzke and Paolo Negri; first beta released June 26, 2013

latest-release.comment: Continuously deployed SaaS; no discrete releases

primary-language.comment: Closed-source SaaS; client SDKs available in JavaScript, PHP, Python, Ruby, Java, .NET

database-support.comment: Managed infrastructure; users don't interact with database directly

multi-tenancy.comment: Supports multiple Spaces per organization; Premium plans include unlimited spaces

static-site-generation.comment: Works well with static site generators via API; official integrations with Next.js, Gatsby, Astro

edge-deployment.comment: Content delivered via globally distributed CDN

content-types.comment: Each content type can have up to 50 fields

field-types.comment: 12 field types: Short Text, Long Text, Rich Text, Integer, Decimal, Date/Time, Location, Boolean, Media, Reference, Array, JSON Object

content-relationships.comment: Reference fields support entry-to-entry and entry-to-asset links; arrays can hold multiple references

nested-components.comment: Rich Text fields support embedded linked entries and assets within content; supports depth up to ~3 levels

localization.comment: Built-in localization workflows with AI-assisted translation for 30+ languages; Free tier limited to 2 locales

content-validation.comment: Field-level validation including character length, required fields, and custom validations

embedded-interactives.comment: Rich Text fields can embed entries inline; combined with App Framework for custom interactive components

draft-publish.comment: Separate Content Preview API for draft content; distinct draft and published states

scheduled-publishing.comment: Timeline feature for scheduling, previewing, and publishing

approval-workflows.comment: Governed workflows with role-based access and approval processes; Premium feature

content-locking.comment: Embargoed assets feature in Premium plans

audit-logging.comment: Complete activity tracking and compliance records; enterprise feature

media-library.comment: Centralized asset library for images, videos, and files

image-transformations.comment: Images API handles image retrieval and transformation capabilities

external-media-storage.comment: Assets stored in Contentful's managed infrastructure; no direct external storage support

video-support.comment: Video upload supported; files over 10MB use separate downloads endpoint

svg-support.comment: SVG files can be uploaded as assets

folder-organization.comment: Flexible taxonomy and metadata organization with tagging and filtering

role-based-access.comment: Free tier: 2 roles (Admin, Editor); Premium: custom roles

granular-permissions.comment: Custom roles and tag-based permissions in Premium plans

sso-saml.comment: SSO integration with SCIM provisioning; Premium feature

team-collaboration.comment: Real-time collaborative editing; comments and assignments

audience-restrictions.comment: Content delivery is API-based; access control implemented in frontend application

typescript-sdk.comment: Official JavaScript SDK with TypeScript definitions

content-type-sdk.comment: Content Management API allows programmatic content model definition; migration scripts supported

cli-tools.comment: Contentful CLI for space operations, migrations, import/export, and extension management

local-development.comment: Local preview supported via Content Preview API; Live Preview SDK for real-time updates

webhooks.comment: HTTP callbacks with filtering, transformations, and request verification

plugin-system.comment: App Framework for custom apps; App Marketplace with integrations

admin-ui-customization.comment: App Framework allows customization of entry editors, sidebars, field editors, and dialogs

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with comprehensive API reference, tutorials, SDK docs, and video guides

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official documentation and starter templates for Next.js, Nuxt, Gatsby, and Astro

search-integration.comment: Webhook template for Algolia integration; basic content search via API queries

preview-mode.comment: Live Preview SDK with real-time updates as you type; Inspector Mode for field tagging

ecommerce-integration.comment: Integrations available via App Marketplace; composable commerce solutions

analytics-integration.comment: Built-in usage reporting; external analytics integration via frontend

ai-features.comment: AI Actions for content creation; AI-assisted localization for 30+ languages; Premium feature

cdn-included.comment: Globally distributed CDN; content served from nearest server

response-caching.comment: CDN cache requests have no limits; cached responses don't count toward rate limits

rate-limits.comment: Default 55 requests per second; higher limits on paid plans; CDN cache hits unlimited

global-regions.comment: Multi-region infrastructure; EU data residency available on Premium

free-tier.comment: Free forever: 10 users, 2 roles, 2 locales, 100K API calls/month, 50GB CDN bandwidth, 1 Starter Space

open-source.comment: Proprietary SaaS platform; client SDKs are open source

pricing-model.comment: Free, Lite ($300/mo), Premium (custom). Pricing based on API calls, bandwidth, users, and features

commercial-support.comment: Dedicated Customer Success Manager and 24/7 support on Premium plans

enterprise-features.comment: SSO, SCIM, 99.99% SLA, custom roles, EU data residency, SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001 certification
